pkgmetadata.longdescription: Cross-platform, display-server-agnostic keyboard remapper written in Rust. Adds layers, home-row mods, tap-hold, chording, and macros to any keyboard the kernel sees. On zentoo it runs as an OpenRC supervise-daemon under the kanata:kanata system user, starting before greetd so remaps are active at the login greeter.

use.flag: Enable potentially dangerous "cmd" action to be able run arbitrary commands.
